detail.description:
Welcome to the shopping paradise! Explore the supermarket world with many popular mini-games. Help your customers shop and get ready for some fun!
 
This supermarket has a lot of sections: a cash register, departments for grocery, cheese and salami, fruits and vegetables, sweets, and toys, a recycling area and other. Do all the necessary tasks and provide superb shopping services to meet your customers’ needs.
 
• Cash register: Have fun scanning items and issuing invoices. Learn about numbers a
